title: Enrich phase5 regime_stats dossier with orthogonal features (MVP scope)
source: Loop A v1 ticks 4 + 5 (both `circularity_violation`) post-B0034 ship. Hypothesizer keeps reaching for `roc_63 / ma_50 / ma_200 / rv_20` because those are the only "interesting" features in the dossier.
value_rationale: M (downgraded from H in 2026-05-27 recalibration — Pass 1 MVP already shipped (d9794fa), proving the post-B0034 equilibrium unblock; remaining Pass 2 work is hygiene with diminishing returns. The H rationale was past-tense after MVP shipped)
scope: Modify [phase5/regime_stats.py](phase5/regime_stats.py) to load cached features from `cache/cot/`, `cache/yahoo/`, `cache/alt_data/`, `cache/fred/` and include them quantile-encoded.
Add `effective_n` per feature per regime (DA medium #3).

history.reason: MVP shipped (d9794fa); Loop A unblocked — T011D2 first survivor with cot_net_noncomm_z52w + real_yield_5y_z252d in feature_overrides.add. Per value_rationale, remaining Pass 2 work (DXY/VIX/GLD/FRED additions) is hygiene with diminishing returns and can be re-opened as a new B-ID if needed.
